title: selaginella versatilis
intro: Selaginella versatilis, also known as spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella versatilis include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
